txt: Project submission page (courses/[id]/project/[projectId]/page.tsx) only has Textarea for text input - no file upload capability despite spec indicating deliverables like GitHub repositories and Postman collections
File upload UI (create/page.tsx) claims 'Click to upload or drag and drop' but only implements onClick handler - no onDragEnter, onDragOver, or onDrop handlers implemented
Creator Dashboard page at src/app/(dashboard)/creator/page.tsx was not implemented - must create per SPEC.md Section 13 for course analytics

route.ts uses invalid XpEventType values: 'mastery_achieved' (should be 'concept_mastered' or 'unit_mastered') and 'course_complete' (should be 'course_completed' with 'd') - TypeScript compilation fails until corrected.
XpEventType definition uses 'concept_mastered', 'unit_mastered', 'course_completed' but xp.ts uses invalid 'mastery_achieved' and 'course_complete' - type mismatch causes runtime failures.
checkAndAwardBadges expects BadgeCriteria['type'] but route.ts passes XpEventType - incompatible union types prevent badge awards.
checkBadgeCriteria parameter type lacks courseId property but badge activity objects have courseId - type definition mismatch.
Variable shadowing in for-of destructuring: parameter 'xp' shadowed by destructured 'xp: thresholdXp'. Always use distinct names like 'thresholdXp' to avoid 'xp >= xp' always evaluating true.

Badge check functions (checkStreakBadge, checkLearningSpeedBadge, checkFocusTimeBadge) existed but were not called from checkAndAwardBadges - integration gap causes badges to never unlock despite correct logic.
Profile page displayed hardcoded streak values from mock data instead of calling getStreak() - UI must use actual system functions for real data.

Variable shadowing bug in calculateLevelFromXp: parameter 'xp' shadows destructured 'xp' from thresholds array, causing 'xp <= xp' to always be true. Rename to 'thresholdXp' and use 'xp >= thresholdXp'.
Badge check functions (checkStreakBadge, checkLearningSpeedBadge) exist but are never called from checkAndAwardBadges - integration gap causes streak/learning_speed/focus_time badges to never unlock
XP events use in-memory Map instead of database - data lost on server restart. SPEC requires PostgreSQL persistence via Prisma/InsForge.
Level progress bar shows overall mastery percentage instead of XP progress toward next level - wrong metric displayed to user
YouTube video embed not implemented despite videoUrl field in content schema. Must use react-youtube or similar library to extract video ID and render iframe embed.
Dropzone UI with visual feedback (background/color changes on drag) improves user experience for file uploads
SM-2 algorithm (flashcards/sm2.ts) correctly implements spaced repetition: easeFactor starts at 2.5, quality < 3 resets repetitions, interval grows exponentially based on ease factor
File processing pipeline (lib/files/file-processor.ts) extracts content from PDF, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, Markdown, and CSV via dedicated extractor functions
YouTube transcript quiz generation (youtube-extractor.ts) creates questions with timestamp references from transcript segments
Visibility modes (private, unlisted, public, invite-only, collaborative) provide fine-grained course access control
Collaboration invite lifecycle implemented via createCollaboratorInvite, getCourseInvites, acceptCollaboratorInvite, hasCollaboratorAccess - full CRUD pattern for course collaboration
Remix applyPersonalization() adjusts course difficulty and module count based on user answers (level, goal, timeAvailable, difficulty, quizFrequency) - adaptive course pattern
SM-2 algorithm implementation uses easeFactor (initial 2.5), interval (days), and repetition count to calculate next review date for mastery tracking
Automatic flashcard generation extracts key terms from content during processing - terms become flashcards with term/definition pairs
Content segmentation pipeline (segmentContent function) splits transcripts/documents into lesson-sized chunks with titles for course generation
Create union type (BadgeCheckEventType = BadgeCriteria['type'] | XpEventType) to bridge incompatible type signatures between checkAndAwardBadges and route handlers
Add optional properties (courseId?: string) to interface definitions to fix type mismatches when functions expect properties not originally in the interface
Canonical implementation location pattern: keep one true implementation in levels.ts, remove duplicate getXpForLevel/getLevelProgress from xp.ts
Timezone-aware streak tracking uses browser timezone via Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone
SM-2 algorithm extended to tutor interactions via processQuizResponse() - same spaced repetition works for quiz and tutor
Quick actions should have fallback responses if the AI API fails - all tutor quick actions implement graceful degradation
Mastery decay formula M = M0 * e^(-k*t) verified: 100 mastery decays to 50 after 7 days with k=0.099
Concept mastery uses recency-weighted average of quiz scores - deterministic: same input always produces same output
Decay on Read: Mastery decay calculated when mastery is accessed, not on background job - more efficient than background jobs
Atomic Unlock Checks: All unlock conditions checked together before granting access to next unit
Deterministic Mastery Calculation: Same quiz scores, time, confidence always produce same mastery output
Video embed uses IIFE pattern within JSX for conditional rendering based on extracted videoId
Use URL object (new URL()) to parse YouTube URLs - handles both youtube.com/watch?v=ID and youtu.be/ID formats more robustly than regex
When adding new content type support, use OR condition with existing lessonType check to maintain backward compatibility
Wrap URL parsing in try/catch to handle malformed URLs gracefully and return null
ModuleList component accepts completedModuleIds prop to show completion status
QuizPlayer uses type composition (QuizQuestion & {options: string[]}) for question options
POST /api/lessons/[id]/complete expects {courseId} in body, not URL params
Zustand persist middleware with partialize ensures only specific fields are persisted
Emit course_created event immediately after persisting course shell to DB after Intent Analyzer (~15% progress) - client can display course card in dashboard before generation completes
Loop through curriculum.units and emit unit_created event for each unit immediately after DB persistence - enables progressive unit display
Loop through each lesson and emit lesson_created event immediately after DB persistence - enables progressive lesson display
Create repository layer (courseRepository.createCourse, createUnit, createLesson) for persistence during long-running generation pipelines
Emit course_created event immediately after persisting course shell to DB - client can show dashboard before generation completes
Multi-agent pipeline (Intent Analyzer, Curriculum Architect, Lesson/Assessment/Flashcard Generators) correctly generates structured course content
Add middleware.ts at project root to check auth_token cookie on protected routes (/dashboard, /courses, /create) and redirect server-side - more robust than client-side useEffect.
Zustand auth store uses persist middleware with partialize correctly - only stores user and isAuthenticated flags, not entire state.
Lucide-react does not have a 'Github' icon. Use 'GitBranch' or check available icons.
Lucide-react does not have a 'Youtube' icon. Use 'Video' or check available icons.
Use cookies() from 'next/headers' to set HttpOnly cookies in server components/routes for secure JWT storage.
Drag-and-drop requires all four handlers (onDragEnter, onDragOver, onDragLeave, onDrop) - missing any causes intermittent behavior
File upload can be optional and submitted alone without text input - allows file-only project deliverables
Creator analytics dashboard shows overview stats, difficult concepts, course performance, and popular courses - follows shadcn/ui Card/Badge/Button/Progress/Tabs pattern
Creator Dashboard page follows established dashboard pattern: uses Card, Badge, Button, Progress, Tabs components from shadcn/ui
Dashboard pages use mock data during development - production API integration required for real analytics
Use UUID v4 for share tokens - provides unguessable, secure token generation without additional dependencies
Public course pages need proper meta tags and Open Graph for SEO - enables social sharing previews
Wrap client-side hooks (useAuth, useRouter) in Suspense boundaries for compatibility with Next.js static generation
Remix personalization wizard should collect: level, goal, timeAvailable, difficulty, quizFrequency for adaptive courses
TooltipTrigger component does not support asChild prop when used with SVG elements in knowledge-map.tsx - must remove asChild or use proper slot pattern.
Invidious API (invidious.jing.rocks) provides free YouTube transcript access without API keys - preferred over official YouTube Data API
TypeScript switch statements must use exact XpEventType values - using similar-but-wrong values like 'mastery_achieved' instead of 'concept_mastered' compiles but causes runtime failures
calculateLevelFromXp has incorrect level 50 threshold (100000 instead of 200000) but function is unused - dormant bug not currently triggered.
XP events in-memory Map architecture is appropriate for client-side transient tracking - requires backend API for persistence across sessions.
XP awards per activity: Lesson(10), Quiz(25+15 bonus>90%), Flashcard(10), Project(50), ConceptMastered(30), UnitMastered(100), Course(500), Streak(20)
Level thresholds follow exponential growth: L1(0),L2(100),L3(250),L4(500),L5(1000),L10(5000),L25(25k),L50(100k)
Streak milestones: 7,14,30,60,100,365 days - key thresholds for gamification engagement
Badge rarity tiers: common, rare, epic, legendary - enables progression visibility
Knowledge map uses SVG rendering - more efficient than canvas/DOM for large concept graphs
Badge checking is event-driven on XP award - checkAndAwardBadges() called after each awardXp() call
Tutor context builder aggregates course info, user progress, quiz scores, and weak/strong concepts for personalized AI responses
detectUnstableConcept() pattern detects when user asks many questions on one concept - enables proactive intervention
recordTutorInteraction() unified tracking pattern for questions, explanations, quiz responses, and practice interactions
getQuickActions() returns typed button configs enabling dynamic action UI from centralized definition
SM-2 algorithm: quality < 3 resets repetitions to 0, quality >= 3 increases interval exponentially based on ease factor
Six mastery levels with ranges: not_learned (0-29), familiar (30-49), developing (50-69), proficient (70-84), strong (85-94), mastered (95-100)
Unit unlock requires average concept mastery >= 85 AND no critical concept below 75 AND mastery check >= 80
Next best action priority order: spaced_review (90), review_weak_concept (80), mastery_check (75), continue_lesson (40)
SM-2 ease factor doubles as difficulty metric for decay calculation
SM-2 Quality Mapping: Ratings 0-5 mapped to mastery deltas (-20 to +10)
Unit locking thresholds: average concept mastery >= 85, no critical concept below 75, mastery check >= 80
extractYouTubeId() returns null for all invalid inputs (undefined, null, empty, invalid URL) - enables consistent fallback handling
Graceful fallback pattern for missing media: Play icon + centered text in flex container
YouTube iframe embed requires allow attributes: encrypted-media, gyroscope, picture-in-picture for proper playback
Lesson viewer path is /courses/[id]/lesson/[lessonId]/page.tsx, not /learn/page.tsx as task spec may indicate - actual path varies from spec
Quiz submission uses fetch('/api/lessons/${quizId}/complete', {method:'POST', body:{courseId}}) pattern - courseId in body, not URL params
Progress persistence uses Zustand persist with localStorage key 'kibi-progress' - works for page refreshes but does not sync across devices
base-ui DropdownMenuTrigger does not support asChild prop - use className styling instead
Course shell course_created event contains placeholder title 'Generating...' initially - actual title from curriculum is assigned later at ~line 120
Use EntityEventCallback type ({ type: string, data: any }) for streaming entity events during generation - allows progressive UI updates
Pass providedCourseId to generateCourse() for coordination between API route and generation pipeline - enables early event emission
Progressive entity streaming pattern: course_created -> unit_created -> lesson_created events allow client to progressively display content
SSE streaming for course generation should emit course_created, unit_created, lesson_created events for early UI updates
MiniMax API streaming uses SSE with 'data: ' prefix, parse by removing prefix and handling [DONE] sentinel
react-hooks/set-state-in-effect lint rule warns about cascading renders when calling setState synchronously in useEffect body - compute derived state instead
File upload validation includes 50MB size limit check before upload - prevents oversized file submissions
Hidden file input with ref pattern allows programmatic file selection triggering - common React pattern for styled upload buttons
